title: RCA of Gotcha
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4okca","text":"This protocol is to test that GotCha is functional and can works as designed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 5 µL of GotCha(functional beads) into eppendorf
Centrifuge for 15000 rpm, °C, 5 minutes and remove supernatant. Make sure that eppendorf should put on DynaMag when removing supernatant.
Add 3 µL of 10X phi29 polymerase reaction buffer into eppendorf with GotCha
Add 1.5 µL of 0.5M EDTA buffer to suspend the reaction
Load 20 µL of reaction solution into 384-well plate
Measure the fluorescence excitation and emission intensity
creator: Chia-Hsien Shih
